headline: Software Engineer @ Ridgeline Systems | Go · Cloud Infrastructure
summary: Backend software engineer at Ridgeline Systems building cloud infrastructure in Go. B.S. in Computer Science from Pacific Crest University (2024). I work daily with Go, PostgreSQL, AWS, Terraform, and Kubernetes, and I care about reliable, observable systems. Outside of work I build side projects (Ridgeline, a self-hosted read-it-later tool) and co-organize the Cascade Code Collective dev meetup in Seattle.
